mapper.sql: id, config_name, config_key, config_value, config_type, remark, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_config SET config_name = #{configName}, config_key = #{configKey}, config_value = #{configValue}, config_type = #{configType}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM sys_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM sys_config WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND config_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{configName}, '%')
AND config_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{configKey}, '%')
AND config_type = #{configType}
ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_config WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND config_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{configName}, '%')
AND config_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{configKey}, '%')
AND config_type = #{configType}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_config SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
